overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing protagonist Aloy walking through the snowy tribal settlement of Mother's Heart. The character traverses elevated wooden walkways, descends to village paths, passes through an ornate carved gate, and crosses a suspension bridge while light snow falls continuously.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway in snowy tribal settlement

events.description: descends wooden steps from elevated walkway to ground level

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated wooden pathway, turning left and descending wooden steps into the lower village area

entered.detail: raised wooden platform with woven railings and blue decorative bindings
traditional dwelling with straw roof and stone chimney
wooden post with blue woven bindings and tribal carvings
flaming torch mounted on wooden post providing warm light
tall stone structure with smoke rising from the top

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated wooden walkway within a snowy tribal settlement. Aloy walks along the woven wooden path, passing carved totem poles and burning torches, then descends wooden steps to ground level. Thatched-roof huts and stone chimneys are visible in the background as light snow falls.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered village path with wooden cottages

agents.ego_description: walking through the village center passing tribal inhabitants and wooden structures

notable_agents.action: tribal villager in fur clothing standing near the path
two villagers conversing near a stack of supply crates

entered.detail: rustic wooden dwelling with thatched roof and stone foundation
tall evergreen trees dusted with snow
stacked wooden containers with blue rope bindings
burning fire pit with stones arranged around it

segments.scene_description: Walking at ground level through the village center, the path is covered in snow and lined with pine trees. Aloy passes wooden cottages and encounters tribal NPCs standing and conversing near supply crates. The atmosphere is quiet with only a few inhabitants visible among the snow-dusted structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: carved wooden gate entrance with ivy-covered walls

events.description: passes through the large carved wooden gate into the outer settlement area

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the ornate wooden gate structure flanked by carved statues

entered.detail: massive tribal gate with carved wooden beams and hanging ornaments
stone walls covered in dense green ivy and snow
tall wooden statue with raised arms flanking the entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene narrows as Aloy approaches an impressive carved wooden gate covered in ivy. Passing through the gateway between two large guardian statues, the environment transitions from the village center to the outer settlement area. The path remains snow-covered as the character moves through the enclosed gate structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge leading to settlement exit with giant totems

events.description: begins crossing the wooden suspension bridge toward the settlement exit

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge and approaching the settlement exit archway in the distance

entered.detail: suspension bridge with woven railings and wooden planks
massive carved wooden figure with raised arms and circular headpiece
large natural stone archway marking the settlement exit

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wide wooden suspension bridge flanked by two massive guardian totems. Aloy crosses the bridge toward a distant mountain archway marking the settlement exit of Mother's Heart. The view expands to show the open landscape beyond the village as the character approaches the exit point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy tribal settlement that transitions from enclosed residential walkways to an expansive mountain exit. It begins on an elevated wooden path lined with carved totem poles and burning torches, descending wooden steps toward the village ground level amidst thatched-roof huts and falling snow. As the camera moves through the village center, the environment opens into a snow-covered plaza where pine trees and wooden cottages frame tribal inhabitants conversing near supply crates. The scene then narrows as the character passes through an ivy-covered carved wooden gate flanked by guardian statues, shifting the perspective from the heart of the village toward the outer settlement. Finally, the view expands across a wide wooden suspension bridge and past massive guardian totems, leading toward a distant mountain archway that marks the exit of Mother's Heart.
